$comment: Agent role configuration for ralph-loops. Maps semantic roles to provider-specific agent names. Category 'dev' = used during work loop, 'review' = used for PR reviews.

anvil.description: Evidence-first coding agent with adversarial review

csharp-quality-expert.description: Quality-enforced .NET build with analyzers and code style enforcement

developer-principal.description: Principal-level developer — system design, cross-cutting concerns, technical strategy

developer-senior.description: Senior developer — clean implementation, testing, patterns, pragmatic engineering

simplisticate.description: Code simplification ��� reduce CRAP scores, cyclomatic complexity, and code smells

pr-review-general.description: General PR review — correctness, maintainability, security, performance

pr-review-security.description: Security-focused PR review — vulnerabilities, auth, data exposure, injection

pr-review-quality.description: Code quality PR review — SOLID, DRY, complexity, testability, naming

pr-review-crap-score.description: CRAP score impact review — cyclomatic complexity × test coverage risk

pr-review-scorecard-score.description: Org scorecard impact review — how the PR affects repo health metrics

auditor-security.description: Security audit — OWASP Top 10, CWE Top 25, threat modeling, vulnerability assessment

auditor-code-quality.description: Code quality audit — complexity, duplication, coupling, testability, maintainability

auditor-crap-score.description: CRAP score audit — identify high-risk methods, guide complexity and coverage improvements

auditor-scorecard-score.description: Scorecard audit — assess repo health against org engineering standards
